Andrej Karpathy

Karpathy in 2024

Andrej Karpathy is a Slovak-Canadian computer scientist.[note 1]

He cofounded Eureka Labs and writes about neural networks.

edit

Career

Karpathy worked at OpenAI and Tesla.

  • OpenAI
  • Tesla
This is noise.
